# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent edge computing security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH = 1024 * 1024; // 1MB limit
const MAX_CHUNKS = 1000;
const ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES = [
  'text/plain',
  'application/json',
  'text/event-stream',
  'application/octet-stream',
];

const ALLOWED_HEADERS = [
  'content-type',
  'cache-control',
  'x-custom-header',
];

interface StreamRequest {
  content?: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  chunkSize?: number;
  delayMs?: number;
}

function validateHeaders(headers: Record<string, string>): Record<string, string> {
  const validated: Record<string, string> = {};
  
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers)) {
    const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
    
    if (!ALLOWED_HEADERS.includes(normalizedKey)) {
      continue;
    }
    
    if (typeof value !== 'string' || value.length > 500) {
      continue;
    }
    
    const sanitizedValue = value.replace(/[\r\n]/g, '');
    
    if (normalizedKey === 'content-type' && !ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES.includes(sanitizedValue)) {
      continue;
    }
    
    validated[normalizedKey] = sanitizedValue;
  }
  
  return validated;
}

function validateContent(content: unknown): string[] {
  if (typeof content === 'string') {
    if (content.length > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
      throw new Error('Content exceeds maximum length');
    }
    return [content];
  }
  
  if (Array.isArray(content)) {
    if (content.length > MAX_CHUNKS) {
      throw new Error('Too many chunks');
    }
    
    let totalLength = 0;
    const validated: string[] = [];
    
    for (const chunk of content) {
      if (typeof chunk !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('Invalid chunk type');
      }
      
      totalLength += chunk.length;
      if (totalLength > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
        throw new Error('Total content exceeds maximum length');
      }
      
      validated.push(chunk);
    }
    
    return validated;
  }
  
  throw new Error('Invalid content format');
}

function validateNumber(value: unknown, min: number, max: number, defaultValue: number): number {
  if (typeof value !== 'number') {
    return defaultValue;
  }
  
  if (!Number.isFinite(value) || value < min || value > max) {
    return defaultValue;
  }
  
  return Math.floor(value);
}

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new NextResponse('Method not allowed', { status: 405 });
  }
  
  const contentType = req.headers.get('content-type');
  if (!contentType || !contentType.includes('application/json')) {
    return new NextResponse('Invalid content type', { status: 400 });
  }
  
  let body: StreamRequest;
  try {
    const text = await req.text();
    if (text.length > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
      return new NextResponse('Request body too large', { status: 413 });
    }
    body = JSON.parse(text);
  } catch (error) {
    return new NextResponse('Invalid JSON', { status: 400 });
  }
  
  let contentChunks: string[];
  try {
    if (!body.content) {
      return new NextResponse('Missing content', { status: 400 });
    }
    contentChunks = validateContent(body.content);
  } catch (error) {
    return new NextResponse(error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Invalid content', { 
      status: 400 
    });
  }
  
  const validatedHeaders = body.headers ? validateHeaders(body.headers) : {};
  const chunkSize = validateNumber(body.chunkSize, 1, 65536, 1024);
  const delayMs = validateNumber(body.delayMs, 0, 5000, 0);
  
  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      const encoder = new TextEncoder();
      
      try {
        for (const chunk of contentChunks) {
          let offset = 0;
          
          while (offset < chunk.length) {
            const slice = chunk.slice(offset, offset + chunkSize);
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(slice));
            offset += chunkSize;
            
            if (delayMs > 0 && offset < chunk.length) {
              await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, delayMs));
            }
          }
        }
        
        controller.close();
      } catch (error) {
        controller.error(error);
      }
    },
  });
  
  const responseHeaders: Record<string, string> = {
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'none'",
    ...validatedHeaders,
  };
  
  return new NextResponse(stream, {
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
